prestazioni: Engine swap to a Chrysler LA-series 426 Hemi (engine code: 426 HEMI) with forged internals including Mahle Motorsport pistons (2618 alloy, 12.5:1 compression), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from Callies Performance. Pair with a custom billet aluminum intake manifold by Holley (designed for dual 4500 Ultra Dominator carburetors) and a custom camshaft from Comp Cams (258°/264° duration, 0.650" lift, 114° LSA).

Forced induction via a custom-built ProCharger F-3R centrifugal supercharger system (12 psi boost) with an intercooler core from Garrett (G-Series, 1200 cfm) and a custom air-to-water intercooler setup by CXRacing. Fuel system upgrades include dual Bosch 044 fuel pumps, Injector Dynamics ID2000x injectors, and a Holley HP EFI standalone ECU with custom tuning by Lund Racing.

Suspension overhaul with a full coilover conversion using Ohlins Road & Track DFV dampers (custom valving for Imperial chassis), Eibach Pro-Street S coil springs (25% stiffer than OEM), and polyurethane bushings from Energy Suspension (full front/rear subframe and control arm kit). Braking system includes Brembo GT 6-piston calipers (380mm rotors front, 355mm rear) with Ferodo DS2500 brake pads and stainless steel braided lines from Goodridge.
estetica: Custom widebody conversion using a bespoke Rocket Bunny/Pandem-style kit (designed exclusively for the Imperial's unibody) with carbon fiber fenders, front splitter, and rear diffuser by Seibon Carbon. Rear wing is a custom 3-piece GT-style unit from APR Performance (adjustable angle, carbon fiber construction).

Full custom interior retrim with Recaro SPG XL seats (reclining, fixed-back, Alcantara/leather combo), a MOMO Prototipo steering wheel (380mm, suede), and a custom roll cage by Autopower Industries (8-point, mild steel, bolt-in design with harness bar). Shift knob is a weighted titanium unit from NRG Innovations (short throw, Imperial-specific thread pattern).

Exterior lighting upgraded to full LED conversion with LUX H8/H11/H16 bulbs (5000K color temperature) and custom sequential turn signals by Diode Dynamics. Paint is a custom 3-stage pearl (House of Kolor Shimrin 2 with Kandy Apple Red over a silver base) applied by a certified PPG refinisher, with matte black accents on the roof, mirrors, and lower body cladding.
